system.description: This skill measures a character's ability to handle small financial operations, know the main commercial routes between specific points, buy or sell all sorts of products, perform the most beneficial money changing, bribe a representative of the law to turn a blind eye, or bargain for the price of a specific item or service. In this last case, the buyer and seller of the object make opposed Commerce rolls: if the seller wins, the price remains firm, and if the buyer wins, he can acquire the object at a reduced price, which could be up to 30% in the case of a critical success on the roll, but which usually is a reduction between 10% and 20% of the original price.
